findings.summary: Adopted Pro R4 claim 'kappa used as SD' without code verification — CI actually uses bootstrap percentiles, not kappa
findings.proposed_fix: Rule: dispatch Explore agent to verify every Pro code-specific claim before synthesis

findings.summary: Write tool rejects new .scratch/ files with 'not read yet' — requires touch+Read+Write workaround
findings.proposed_fix: Document in env gotchas, no tool-level fix available

findings.summary: ls -lt fails due to eza alias intercepting -t flag
findings.proposed_fix: Use find -newer or stat for time-sorted listings

findings.summary: Attempted Edit on protected canary fixture before checking data-guard hook patterns
findings.proposed_fix: Check PROTECTED_PATHS before Edit, provide manual command to user

findings.summary: Read full lr_combiner.py in main context then agent re-read same file
findings.evidence: 782-line file read twice across context boundary
findings.proposed_fix: Include key line numbers in agent prompt instead of having agent re-read
